name: North Bay Resources Inc.
description: North Bay Resources Inc. is a natural resources exploration and mining company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and monetization of gold and copper mineral deposits across the United States and Canada. The company's key assets include the Bishop Gold Mill in Inyo County, California, and the extensive Fran Gold Project in British Columbia. North Bay Resources actively manages a portfolio of mining properties, including the Taber Mine, Murex Copper, and Copper Island, aiming to return value to shareholders through the strategic development and processing of its mineral assets.
